chapter_title.en: Chapter 100 – Waiting period of the Mut’a

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/242)
text: هُ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَحِيضُ فَحَيْضَةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ لَا تَحِيضُ فَشَهْرٌ وَ نِصْفٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umyer, from Umar Bin Azina, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If she was menstruating, so one menstruation, and if she was not menstruating, so a month and a half (as a waiting period)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Waiting period in al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage) is one cycle of Hayd (menses) if she experiences Hayd (menses); and if she does not experience Hayd (menses) then it is one and a half month.’”
